name: Llama Chat
setup: cd ~ && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp && cd llama.cpp && cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build -j$(nproc) && mkdir -p ~/models && curl -fsSL -o ~/models/tinyllama.gguf 'https://huggingface.co/TheBloke/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0-GGUF/resolve/main/tinyllama-1.1b-chat-v1.0.Q4_0.gguf'
